trans-unit.source: Geoinformation systems (GIS) visualize data by stacking layers on top of one another to create maps. Every layer represents one set of information. This is a vital concept to understand since analysis, as well as visualisation of data, is based on it.
trans-unit.target: Geoinformation systems (GIS) visualize data by stacking layers on top of one another to create maps. Every layer represents one set of information. This is a vital concept to understand since analysis, as well as visualisation of data, is based on it.

trans-unit.source: The layer concept in GIS applications. Source unknown. All rights reserved. This content is excluded from our Creative Commons license. :::
trans-unit.target: The layer concept in GIS applications. Source unknown. All rights reserved. This content is excluded from our Creative Commons license. :::

trans-unit.source: Check the check-box in the Layers panel on the bottom left:
trans-unit.target: Check the check-box in the Layers panel on the bottom left:

trans-unit.source: Right click on your layer → `Zoom to layer(s)`.
trans-unit.target: Right click on your layer → `Zoom to layer(s)`.

trans-unit.source: Move layers in the hierarchy
trans-unit.target: Move layers in the hierarchy

trans-unit.source: Move a layer up and down in the Layer panel by drag-and-drop.
trans-unit.target: Move a layer up and down in the Layer panel by drag-and-drop.

trans-unit.source: Move a layer to the top: Right click on your layer → `Move To Top`.
trans-unit.target: Move a layer to the top: Right click on your layer → `Move To Top`.

trans-unit.source: Right click on your layer → `Rename Layer`.
trans-unit.target: Right click on your layer → `Rename Layer`.

trans-unit.source: Each layer has additional properties that you can view and customise. The most important are:
trans-unit.target: Each layer has additional properties that you can view and customise. The most important are:

trans-unit.source: __Information:__ An overview of the layer name, file format, storage location, spatial extent, number of features (objects),...
trans-unit.target: __Information:__ An overview of the layer name, file format, storage location, spatial extent, number of features (objects),...

trans-unit.source: __Symbology:__ Display mode of the layer, style, transparency,...
trans-unit.target: __Symbology:__ Display mode of the layer, style, transparency,...
